title: Amtech M0750 High Tension Hacksaw
availability_text: Only 5 left in stock (more on the way).
features: ADJUSTABLE: This high tension hacksaw has a strong, durable chrome plated aluminium frame with blade cuttings angles adjustable between 90° and 50°
SPARE BLADE: With a square handle for sure grip, it is supplied with a spare 300mm (12") strong 24 TPI carbon steel blade
WORKSHOP FRIENDLY: Ideal for home use or trade environments
STABLE OPERATION: Designed to minimise movement during cutting tasks
TIME SAVING: Enhances productivity through fast and accurate cutting
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains Adjustable hacksaw (1 frame and 12-inch (300mm) Blades) See more
